title: Orion Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Reentrancy exploit using flash loaned stablecoins to double the attacker's balance

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls depositAsset() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Manipulated swaps of flash loaned stablecoins
Creating a fake token and routing through it
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS depositAsset() AFTER A FLASH LOAN BORROW IN THE SAME TX
summary: Orion Protocol lost $3M due to a reentrancy exploit where the attacker used flash loaned stablecoins to artificially deposit assets twice, leading to a doubled balance. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
